company.name: Nike Product Intelligence
company.description: Local demo company that coordinates agentic Scrapy + Zyte API product extraction for public Nike pages.

agents.name: Coordinator
agents.title: Coordinator
agents.capabilities: Breaks extraction goals into issues, requests approval, and keeps work aligned with compliance and reliability.

agents.name: ScrapyBuilder
agents.title: Scrapy Builder
agents.capabilities: Runs Zyte Claude skills to define schema, generate Scrapy project, create web-poet page objects, and wire spiders.

agents.name: QAReviewer
agents.title: QA Reviewer
agents.capabilities: Runs fixtures and sample crawls, checks required fields, duplicates, and Zyte API usage.

agents.name: Monitor
agents.title: Catalog Health Monitor
agents.capabilities: Runs scheduled health checks and opens repair issues when crawl quality drops.

issues.title: Approve Nike product extraction schema
issues.description: Use docs/product-schema.md as the intended schema. The builder must generate a review page and request approval before code generation.

issues.title: Generate Scrapy + Zyte API project through Zyte Claude skills
issues.description: Run prompts/zyte-skill-pipeline.md from the demo workspace. Do not handwrite selectors. Stop if credentials or compliance gates fail.

issues.title: Validate generated fixtures and sample crawl
issues.description: Run fixtures, crawl 10 product records, and verify required fields, duplicates, and Zyte API evidence.

routine.title: Daily Nike Catalog Health Check
routine.description: Run a small crawl, summarize item count, required-field completeness, duplicate URLs, Zyte API evidence, and open a repair issue if quality drops.
